subject: Personal-brand identity for a premium fitness model and trainer website

observed_identity.face_structure: Long oval face with defined cheekbones, a softly angular jaw, a narrower chin, balanced forehead height, and a straight refined nose. The face reads elegant and athletic rather than round, baby-faced, or highly exaggerated.
observed_identity.eye_color: Light blue-green to gray-blue eyes with clear contrast and a calm, direct gaze.
observed_identity.brows: Medium-density brows with a soft natural arch; polished but not overly sculpted or blocky.
observed_identity.lips: Naturally full lips with a fuller lower lip, moderate upper-lip volume, and a defined cupid's bow. Keep the lips soft and real, never overfilled.
observed_identity.jaw: Clean, feminine jawline with subtle angular definition; avoid squaring it off or making it too delicate.

styling_variants: smooth straight lengths with a clean side or soft center part
soft textured glam volume for black-and-white portrait work

observed_identity.athletic_body_description: Lean athletic female build with visible training tone through shoulders, arms, waist, glutes, and legs. Proportions are balanced and strong, with a model-like frame, defined but not bulky musculature, and a feminine athletic silhouette.

guidance: Preserve only tattoos that are naturally visible in the reference-driven pose, crop, wardrobe, or hairstyle.
Known tattoo visibility appears subtle and placement-specific across the hand, forearm or arm, neck or behind-ear area, and lower leg or foot depending on image selection.
If a chosen reference setup hides a tattoo, do not force it into the image.
Keep tattoo scale, density, and placement understated and believable.
Do not invent extra tattoos, sleeves, chest pieces, or large back work.

likeness_must_preserve_rules: Preserve the long oval face shape, cheekbone structure, jawline taper, and natural adult proportions.
Preserve the light blue-green eye color and realistic eye spacing.
Preserve the straight refined nose and avoid shortening or button-nose drift.
Preserve the natural lip shape and fullness without cosmetic over-enhancement.
Preserve the subject as a fit, elegant, athletic blonde-bronde woman rather than a generic glamour archetype.
Use 2 to 3 likeness images in every generation round to anchor the face before adding body or style references.
Favor clean skin texture and realistic beauty detail over artificial smoothing or plastic skin.
likeness_avoid_rules: Do not turn her into a generic AI blonde with widened eyes, smaller nose, or inflated lips.
Do not round the face, soften the jaw too much, or erase the cheekbone definition.
Do not overfill lips, over-contour the face, or push makeup into heavy influencer glam.
Do not exaggerate bust, hips, glutes, or hourglass proportions beyond the real athletic build.
Do not make the hair platinum, yellow-blonde, or unrealistically bright.
Do not add extra tattoos or move existing tattoos to new body locations.
Do not over-sexualize wardrobe, expression, or posing.
style_direction_rules: Visual tone should feel premium, elegant, athletic, feminine, and editorial.
Blend luxury fitness energy with refined portrait photography rather than commercial gym clichés.
Use black-and-white Hollywood glam selectively for iconic hero moments.
Use warm neutral editorial lighting for trust, softness, and premium approachability.
Use selective color sparingly and intentionally, never as a gimmick.
Keep wardrobe elevated, body-aware, and strong without feeling overtly sexualized.
Prefer believable posture, realistic anatomy, and subtle physical tension over extreme action posing.
brand_tone_rules: Editorial but still warm and human

google_ai_studio_reference_principles.default_attachment_strategy: Attach 2 to 3 likeness references first, then 1 body reference, then 1 style reference. Use 5 images max unless a prompt truly needs 6.
google_ai_studio_reference_principles.consistency_rule: Reuse the same core likeness trio across the first approval round to reduce identity drift.
google_ai_studio_reference_principles.creative_control_rule: Keep prompt language specific and premium, but do not overload the prompt with too many competing aesthetic instructions.
